item.title: Independent Search Engines
item.description: Here's a list providing a wide range of specialized search engines and tools that can be used to find information beyond what typical search engines like Google provide. These tools cover areas like satellite imagery, legal documents, chemical data, cybersecurity, etc. I haven't verified all of these myself, please comment if you find some of them don't work. And do expand and repost this list! https://www.wiby.me/ - Searches only handcrafted human websites from before SEO https://www.marginalia.nu/ - Finds only genuine sites buried under SEO spam https://www.same.energy/ - Searches images by pure visual mood and feeling https://www.tineye.com/ - Finds every website where any image ever appeared https://www.sentinel-hub.com/ - Searches real-time satellite imagery of any location https://www.zoom.earth/ - Searches live satellite and weather data globally free https://www.marinetraffic.com/ - Searches real-time location of every ship at sea https://www.flightaware.com/ - Searches live flight positions of every aircraft globally https://www.n2yo.com/ - Searches real-time position of every satellite orbiting earth https://www.space-reference.org/ - Searches complete data on every known space object https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene - Searches entire human genome and genetic sequence database https://www.uniprot.org/ - Searches every known protein structure on earth completely http://www.chemspider.com/ - Searches 100 million chemical structures and compounds free https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/ - Searches complete chemical data on any compound ever documented https://www.guidetopharmacology.org/ - Searches every known drug target and pharmacological interaction https://clinicaltrials.gov/ - Searches every medical trial happening globally right now https://www.courtlistener.com/ - Searches millions of US court opinions and legal documents https://pacer.uscourts.gov/ - Searches every US federal court case ever filed publicly https://www.judyrecords.com/ - Searches 330 million US court records completely free https://www.opensanctions.org/ - Searches every global sanctions list and criminal watchlist https://offshoreleaks.icij.org/ - Searches Panama and Pandora Papers for hidden wealth https://aleph.occrp.org/ - Searches leaked documents exposing global financial crimes https://globalfishingwatch.org/ - Searches real-time illegal fishing activity worldwide https://www.globalforestwatch.org/ - Searches real-time deforestation anywhere on earth https://earthdata.nasa.gov/ - Searches decades of NASA satellite environmental data free https://earthexplorer.usgs.gov/ - Searches historical satellite imagery of any location https://www.radioreference.com/ - Searches every radio frequency and scanner feed globally https://www.broadcastify.com/ - Searches live police fire and emergency radio feeds worldwide https://haveibeenpwned.com/ - Searches if your email appears in any breach database https://dehashed.com/ - Searches leaked credentials across hundreds of breach databases https://intelx.io/ - Searches dark web pastes leaks and historical breach archives https://www.shodan.io/ - Searches every internet-connected device exposed globally https://censys.io/ - Searches every publicly exposed server and certificate online https://www.greynoise.io/ - Searches malicious internet noise separated from real attacks https://netlas.io/ - Searches real-time internet assets for professional reconnaissance https://publicwww.com/ - Searches raw HTML source code across the entire web https://www.wolframalpha.com/ - Searches and computes answers from structured knowledge directly https://ahmia.fi/ - Searches verified Tor onion sites safely from the clearnet https://lebowskigifs.com - Will generate a random .gif from The Big Lebowski, and help find any dialogue from the film
item.dc:creator: NinjaCongo

item.title: Amazon bricks older Kindles on May 20
item.description: Yeah fuck Amazon, yet again. EDIT 2: https://kindlemodding.org/jailbreaking/

"Nothingbutkuntry" is a self described anti MAGA small town Okie Army Veteran, who seems to be right-on with what he says here.

item.title: Too Soon?
item.description: Posted this on FB and got conservatives all riled up and angry. I don’t care, I’m not concerned with the feelings of people who laugh a detainees being abused, who posted laughing emojis when I talked about a toddler being sexually abused while in ICE care, people who constantly send me death threats, or other threats of violence. They can stay mad. https://www.facebook.com/InternetMexican
item.dc:creator: internetmexican

item.title: Henri Cartier-Bresson appreciation mini-dump
item.description:
Henri Cartier-Bresson is deemed the pioneer of street photography, capturing candid moments with unaware members of the public.
He held the position that the essence of photography is ”capturing the decisive moment”.
As the eldest son of five children, he was expected to take over his father’s prosperous textile manufacturing business, but being both strong-willed and – already from a young age – more interested in painting, photography, music and literature, he decided to pursue art instead.
He is stated to be a descendant of Charlotte Corday, the moderate (Girondin) assassin of French Revolution-era radical (Jacobin) Jean-Paul Marat – and since she did not have any children (the existence of which would probably have rendered beyond doubt unnecessary the post-execution virginity test the Jacobins subjected her to), it is an interesting claim.
He happened upon and entered a menage-à-trois with shunned ex-patriate hedonist socialites Harry and Caresse Crosby (the latter having picked Caresse as her new first name at the behest of Harry, after briefly having considered Clytoris). But this arrangement did not last long, due to the Crosby couple’s suicide pact being semi-executed thirteen years sooner than scheduled, and to the dismay of Caresse, with another woman. Henri remained Caresse’s lover for no more than two years, until he was dismissed.
Broken-hearted by Caresse, he left Paris and France and Europe, and sought adventure in Côte d’Ivoire (then part of French colonial Africa). He subsisted on hunting wild animals and selling the carcasses to the local populace. Through hunting in the wild, he learned methods of subterfuge and subtlety that he would later use in his photographical career.
Back in Europe, he purchased a Leica camera with a small form-factor and a 50-mm lens, and painted over all the shiny metal elements on the camera with black paint (later, he would often use black tape instead), to remain inconspicuous in the public eye. And his efforts in capturing the candid moments of the public were successful.
His first photographs to be published in a newspaper were his covering of the coronation of King George VI and Queen Elizabeth. Somewhat contrary to the assignment, but congenial with his continued career, he did not take any photos of the King and Queen, but only of members of the joyous crowd that had assembled to celebrate the new monarchs.
During service in the film and photo unit of the French Third Army, he was captured and held prisoner by the Nazi Wehrmacht. After almost three years in captivity and two failed escape attempts, his third escape proved successful, and he was able to dig up his Leica camera in a mountainside farmland.
Although never formally affiliated with the French Communist Party, for two years he had worked as a photographer for its evening newspaper, "Ce Soir". He had also helped out in the production of a film made by the party, highlighting the 200 French families who exerted great fiscal power over France by holding large hereditary shareholder positions in the French National Bank – including his own. He covered the Communist revolution in China, the Indonesian revolution for independence from the Dutch, and was the first Western photographer to work in relative freedom in the Cold-War-era Soviet Union.
He never shot with a flash, likening its use to ”coming to a concert with a pistol in your hand.”
He started a tradition of testing out new camera lenses by taking photos of ducks in urban parks. While never publishing these as part of his oeuvre, he considered this the ”baptism” of the lens, and regarded the ritual as ”my only superstition”.
He did not label his work as ”art”, instead insisting that his photographs were merely his gut reaction to fleeting situations that he happened upon, and that ”a photograph could fix eternity in an instant.”
In harmony with his view that the goal of photography was to capture it, he posited that there was nothing in this world that did not possess "a decisive moment".
He was married for thirty years to Javanese dancer Ratna Mohini, before marrying Belgian photographer Martine Franck, thirty years his junior. During their third year as a married couple, their first and only child was born.
He attained an age of 95 years before passing, having lived from 1908 – the year of the introduction of the Ford Model T (the first mass-produced automobile, ushering in the era of car transportation) – until 2004 – the year of the landing of the Mars rover Opportunity (the first robotic vehicle to remain operational on another celestial body for more than 14 years).
item.dc:creator: LilyCorinth

item.description: Vote.gov anybody can get a mail-in ballot by saying they're sick; call your County seat. There's too much urgency not to vote. Apathy is no longer an option. The response now taking shape isn’t just political—it’s collective. It’s nurses, teachers, farmers, tech workers, seniors, immigrants—all rediscovering the power of us. Start simple: Register. Vote. Show up. Join a union and/or coalition. Back the fighters: •ACLU – Defending civil rights in every courtroom. https://aflcio.org/ •SEIU – Organizing service and care workers for fair pay. Indivisible – Mobilizing grassroots democracy advocates •NOW – Championing equality and reproductive justice. Public Citizen – Holding corporations and lobbyists accountable. •AFL‑CIO – Uniting workers across industries and states. •NEA – Standing up for public education and teachers. https://www.nea.org/ •MADRE – Advancing global women’s and human rights.https://www.madre.org/ •SPLC – Confronting hate groups and systemic injustice.https://www.splcenter.org/ •AARP – Fighting for dignity and security in aging.https://www.aarp.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/query/getOrgQry.do https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/ This is what democracy looks like when it remembers itself. They think 98% of us will quietly adapt to there propaganda. They're wrong. vote.gov to get registered and vote. https://rbreich.com/ top right menu videos
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: Please help spread this EU citizens initiative for full suspension of EU-Israel association agreement
item.description: Fellow EU citizens, please help me spread this EU citizens initiative for full suspension of EU-Israel Association agreement. Israel must be stopped. Copy the link and send it to anyone who is interested (or not interested). EU Citizens' initiative link (sign, copy and share with everyone): https://eci.ec.europa.eu/055/public/#/screen/home Target is 1.500.000, above the minimum, just in case some signatures are invalid. Facts: The EU is Israel’s biggest tradinge partner, accounting for 32% of Israel's total trade in goods with the world in 2024. 34.2% of Israel’s imports came from the EU while , and 28.8% of the country’s exports went to the EU.  Source: https://policy.trade.ec.europa.eu/eu-trade-relationships-country-and-region/countries-and-regions/israel_en Israel must be stopped!!! #europe #european_union #israel #genocide #gaza #palestine #freepalestine #libanon #Germany #France #Italy #Spain #Poland #Netherlands #Belgium #Sweden #Austria #Denmark #Finland #Ireland #Portugal #Czechia #Romania #Hungary #Greece #Slovakia #Bulgaria #Croatia #Lithuania #Slovenia #Latvia #Estonia #Cyprus #Luxembourg #Malta #peace

item.title: Memes in these trying times
item.description:
Just snaked my drain. Yay adulting. It was baaad
Biracial. Literally.
It’s fun and it’s free.
Passed my final :) boobs and all
Ma’am, we see rabbits here
Your seal isn’t fooling us
Bobs predicts heated rivalry
Enjoy the victories even though things are bad.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @HandPaintedCloth made this with BLEACH! That's crazy. Love this. Check out their other stuff in their posts and leave some love.
27 Man Tax: Simu Liu
“We may try to see things as objectively as we please. Nonetheless, we can never see them with any eyes except our own.” - Benjamin N. Cardozo So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me Sorry I was a few hours late!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This door in Westminster Abbey is older than most modern nation-states. Made in the 1050s from an English oak, it's the only surviving Anglo-Saxon door in Britain.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9
